478.description: Pathways Inc. is the Community Mental Health Center for 14 northeast Kentucky counties (Bath, Boyd, Carter, Elliott, Fleming, Greenup, Lawrence, Lewis, Mason, Menifee, Montgomery, Morgan, Rowan, Wolfe). Provides outpatient mental health, addiction/dual diagnosis, intellectual disability services, mobile crisis, and Crisis Residential Recovery Units (CRRU). Offers in-jail programming and reentry linkage for county jail populations. 24/7 crisis line and walk-in crisis assessment available.
478.description_es: Pathways Inc. es el CMHC para 14 condados del noreste de Kentucky. Proporciona salud mental ambulatoria, adicción/diagnóstico dual, crisis móvil y Unidades de Recuperación Residencial de Crisis (CRRU). Ofrece programación en cárceles del condado y vinculación de reinserción. Línea de crisis 24/7 y evaluación de crisis sin cita.
478.notes: Scheduling Center: 866-233-1955 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–5 p.m.). CRRU East walk-in: 201 22nd Street, Ashland. Also serves 10-county region including Boyd—verify county office at pathways-ky.org/contact-us.
478.notes_es: Centro de programación: 866-233-1955. CRRU Este sin cita: 201 22nd Street, Ashland. Verifique oficina del condado en pathways-ky.org.
478.hours: Outpatient Mon–Fri 8:30 a.m.–5 p.m. (extended hours at select offices); crisis line 24/7
478.services: Outpatient mental health and addiction treatment|24/7 mobile crisis|CRRU residential crisis and SUD recovery|In-jail behavioral health programming|Intellectual and developmental disability services

479.description: Addiction Recovery Care (ARC) operates 30+ CARF-accredited treatment centers across Eastern Kentucky with a Crisis to Career model combining detox, residential, outpatient, MAT, faith-based recovery, and vocational training. Headquartered in Russell/Louisa area. Intake coordinates insurance verification, transportation within 24 hours, and facility placement. Accepts Kentucky Medicaid and private insurance. Strong reentry focus with peer staff and internship-to-employment pathways.
479.description_es: ARC opera más de 30 centros de tratamiento acreditados CARF en el este de Kentucky con modelo Crisis to Career combinando detox, residencial, ambulatorio, MAT, recuperación de fe y capacitación vocacional. Admisión coordina seguro, transporte en 24 horas y colocación. Acepta Medicaid de Kentucky.
479.notes: Residential locations include White Oak Hill (Inez), Crown Recovery, Riverplace, and others—call intake for nearest bed. Over 50% of staff are in recovery. Sullivan University certificate pathway available.
479.notes_es: Ubicaciones residenciales incluyen White Oak Hill (Inez), Crown Recovery y otras—llame para cama más cercana. Más del 50% del personal está en recuperación.
479.hours: Intake line answered during business hours; admissions 24/7 coordination
479.services: Detox and residential treatment|Intensive and outpatient programs|Medication-assisted treatment|Vocational training and internships|Transportation to treatment

480.description: Mountain Comprehensive Care Center (MCCC) is the regional CMHC for 14 Eastern Kentucky counties including Breathitt, Floyd, Harlan, Johnson, Knott, Knox, Lawrence, Leslie, Letcher, Magoffin, Martin, Morgan, Perry, and Pike. Provides mental health, substance use, crisis, and developmental disability services with offices in Prestonsburg, Hazard, Whitesburg, Harlan, Pikeville, and more. Offers in-jail mental health screening and linkage at multiple county detention centers.
480.description_es: MCCC es el CMHC regional para 14 condados del este de Kentucky incluidos Floyd, Perry, Pike, Letcher, Knott y Harlan. Proporciona salud mental, uso de sustancias, crisis y discapacidades del desarrollo con oficinas en Prestonsburg, Hazard, Whitesburg, Harlan y Pikeville. Ofrece evaluación de salud mental en cárceles.
480.notes: Crisis: (800) 262-7491. Also operates residential programs including Cliffview Recovery (Garrard County). Call main line for county office nearest you.
480.notes_es: Crisis: (800) 262-7491. También opera programas residenciales incluyendo Cliffview Recovery. Llame para la oficina más cercana.
480.hours: Crisis line 24/7; outpatient hours vary by location
480.services: Outpatient mental health and SUD treatment|24/7 crisis services|In-jail screening and linkage|Residential treatment referrals|Developmental disability support

481.description: Big Sandy Area Community Action Program (BSACAP) serves Floyd, Johnson, Lawrence, Magoffin, Martin, and Pike counties—the primary community action agency near Big Sandy Regional Jail. Provides LIHEAP utility assistance, emergency aid, food programs, housing support, Head Start, and case management for low-income individuals including those leaving local county jails.
481.description_es: BSACAP sirve los condados Floyd, Johnson, Lawrence, Magoffin, Martin y Pike—agencia de acción comunitaria principal cerca de Big Sandy Regional Jail. Proporciona LIHEAP, ayuda de emergencia, programas de alimentos, vivienda y gestión de casos.
481.notes: LIHEAP and emergency assistance by appointment. Also administers weatherization and senior services. Contact Prestonsburg office for county-specific programs.
481.notes_es: LIHEAP y asistencia de emergencia con cita. También administra climatización y servicios para personas mayores.
481.services: LIHEAP utility assistance|Emergency financial aid|Food and housing support|Head Start|Reentry case management referrals

482.description: Appalachian Citizens' Law Center is a nonprofit law firm providing free civil legal representation to low-income Eastern Kentuckians, focused on Letcher, Harlan, Perry, Floyd, and Pike counties. Handles housing, public benefits, civil rights, expungement, black lung and mine safety claims, and workers' rights—critical for returning citizens navigating legal barriers to employment and housing.
482.description_es: Appalachian Citizens' Law Center es una firma sin fines de lucro que proporciona representación legal civil gratuita a personas de bajos ingresos en el este de Kentucky, enfocada en Letcher, Harlan, Perry, Floyd y Pike. Maneja vivienda, beneficios, derechos civiles, eliminación de antecedentes y derechos laborales.
482.notes: Also specializes in black lung benefits and mine safety cases. Income eligibility applies. Call for intake—do not assume representation until confirmed.
482.notes_es: También se especializa en beneficios de pulmón negro y seguridad minera. Aplica elegibilidad de ingresos.
482.services: Free civil legal representation|Expungement assistance|Housing and benefits appeals|Black lung and workers' rights|Civil rights cases

483.description: Cumberland River Behavioral Health (CRBH) is the CMHC for 10 southeastern Kentucky counties: Bell, Clay, Harlan, Jackson, Knox, Laurel, McCreary, Rockcastle, Wayne, and Whitley. Provides outpatient mental health, psychiatric services, substance use treatment, and 24/7 crisis intervention. Serves county jail populations in Corbin, Barbourville, London, and Williamsburg areas with in-jail and reentry linkage programming.
483.description_es: CRBH es el CMHC para 10 condados del sureste de Kentucky: Bell, Clay, Harlan, Jackson, Knox, Laurel, McCreary, Rockcastle, Wayne y Whitley. Proporciona salud mental ambulatoria, servicios psiquiátricos, tratamiento de sustancias e intervención en crisis 24/7.
483.notes: 24/7 Crisis: (800) 315-1246. Main administrative office in Corbin area. Multiple county outpatient offices—call for nearest location.
483.notes_es: Crisis 24/7: (800) 315-1246. Oficina administrativa principal en área de Corbin.
483.hours: Crisis line 24/7; outpatient Mon–Fri business hours
483.services: Outpatient mental health therapy|Psychiatric evaluation and medication|Substance use treatment|24/7 crisis intervention|In-jail behavioral health linkage

484.description: Cumberland Valley Area Development District (CVADD) is the regional planning agency for Bell, Clay, Harlan, Jackson, Knox, Laurel, McCreary, Rockcastle, Wayne, and Whitley counties. Coordinates workforce, housing, transportation, and senior services across the 10-county Cumberland Valley region. Can connect individuals leaving county jails to local resources and American Job Center partner locations.
484.description_es: CVADD es la agencia regional de planificación para 10 condados del Valle de Cumberland. Coordina fuerza laboral, vivienda, transporte y servicios para personas mayores. Puede conectar a personas que salen de cárceles del condado con recursos locales.
484.notes: Partners with Kentucky Career Center Cumberlands for workforce services. London office serves as regional hub. Not a direct service provider for all programs—referral and coordination role.
484.notes_es: Socio de Kentucky Career Center Cumberlands. Oficina de London como hub regional.
484.services: Regional resource coordination|Workforce development partnerships|Transportation and senior services info|LIHEAP referral routing|Community planning support

485.description: Lake Cumberland Community Action Agency serves Pulaski, Russell, Casey, Clinton, Cumberland, and Wayne counties with emergency assistance, LIHEAP utility help, food programs, housing aid, weatherization, and case management. Key resource for individuals leaving Pulaski County Detention Center and surrounding south-central Kentucky county jails.
485.description_es: Lake Cumberland Community Action Agency sirve seis condados del centro-sur de Kentucky con asistencia de emergencia, LIHEAP, programas de alimentos, ayuda de vivienda y gestión de casos. Recurso clave para personas que salen de la cárcel del Condado de Pulaski.
485.notes: LIHEAP applications seasonal—contact for current enrollment windows. Emergency aid requires documentation of need.
485.notes_es: Solicitudes LIHEAP estacionales—contacte para ventanas de inscripción actuales.
485.services: LIHEAP utility assistance|Emergency financial aid|Food and housing programs|Weatherization|Case management for low-income households

486.description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 14 serves Perry County and surrounding Eastern Kentucky counties from Hazard. Supervises felony probation, parole, and conditional discharge cases in the coalfields region. Contact for reporting schedule, officer assignment, and compliance requirements after release to the Hazard area.
486.description_es: Distrito 14 de Libertad Condicional y Vigilada sirve al Condado de Perry y condados circundantes del este de Kentucky desde Hazard. Supervisa casos de libertad condicional, vigilada y descarga condicional.
486.notes: Central DOC line: (502) 782-2277. Bring photo ID to all reporting appointments. EKCEP SITE (id 281) offers barrier relief in overlapping counties.
486.notes_es: Línea central DOC: (502) 782-2277. Traiga identificación con foto. EKCEP SITE ofrece alivio de barreras en condados superpuestos.
486.services: Probation and parole supervision|Scheduled reporting|Officer case management|Compliance monitoring|Eastern KY supervision

487.description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 10 serves Laurel, Whitley, Knox, Bell, and surrounding Southeastern Kentucky counties from London. Regional supervision hub for the I-75 corridor and Cumberland Valley. Contact for reporting requirements—District 10 main line per DOC: (606) 330-2045.
487.description_es: Distrito 10 sirve a los condados Laurel, Whitley, Knox, Bell y condados circundantes del sureste de Kentucky desde London. Hub regional de supervisión para el corredor I-75.
487.notes: Also listed at 51 North Main Street, London. Harlan County satellite: (606) 573-1561. Clay County: (606) 337-7015.
487.notes_es: También en 51 North Main Street, London. Satélite Condado Harlan: (606) 573-1561.
487.services: Multi-county probation supervision|Parole reporting|Officer assignment|Compliance monitoring|SE KY regional supervision

488.description: Lincoln Trail Behavioral Health System (part of Centerstone Kentucky network) is the CMHC for Hardin, LaRue, Marion, Meade, and Washington counties in the Elizabethtown/Lincoln Trail region. Provides outpatient mental health, substance use treatment, psychiatric services, and 24/7 crisis response. Partners with Hardin County and regional county jails for mental health screenings and in-jail programming.
488.description_es: Lincoln Trail Behavioral Health System es el CMHC para Hardin, LaRue, Marion, Meade y Washington. Proporciona salud mental ambulatoria, tratamiento de sustancias, servicios psiquiátricos y crisis 24/7. Socio de cárceles del condado para evaluaciones de salud mental.
488.notes: Crisis line: (270) 769-1304 (same as main). Centerstone Kentucky operates multiple CMHC brands statewide. Walk-in crisis available—call first.
488.notes_es: Línea de crisis: (270) 769-1304. Centerstone Kentucky opera múltiples CMHC en el estado.
488.hours: Crisis line 24/7; outpatient Mon–Fri business hours
488.services: Outpatient mental health and SUD treatment|Psychiatric evaluation|24/7 crisis services|In-jail mental health screening|Reentry behavioral health linkage

489.description: Kentucky Career Center — Elizabethtown (Lincoln Trail Area Development District) is an American Job Center serving Hardin, LaRue, and surrounding Lincoln Trail counties. Free job search, resume workshops, career counseling, skills training funding (WIOA), and employer connections for individuals with criminal records and other employment barriers.
489.description_es: Kentucky Career Center — Elizabethtown sirve a Hardin, LaRue y condados circundantes de Lincoln Trail. Búsqueda de empleo gratuita, talleres de currículum, orientación profesional, financiamiento WIOA y conexiones con empleadores para personas con antecedentes penales.
489.notes: Co-located with Lincoln Trail ADD workforce services. Veterans and dislocated worker programs available. Call for appointment or walk-in hours.
489.notes_es: Co-ubicado con servicios de fuerza laboral de Lincoln Trail ADD. Programas para veteranos disponibles.
489.services: Free job search assistance|Resume and interview workshops|WIOA training funding|Career counseling|Second-chance employer connections

490.description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 5 serves Hardin, LaRue, Marion, Meade, and Washington counties from Elizabethtown. Supervises probation and parole cases in the Lincoln Trail region including Fort Knox area communities. DOC contact line: (270) 766-5073.
490.description_es: Distrito 5 sirve a Hardin, LaRue, Marion, Meade y Washington desde Elizabethtown. Supervisa casos de libertad condicional y vigilada en la región Lincoln Trail.
490.notes: Office: 422 South Mulberry Street. Grayson County satellite: (270) 259-4696. Central DOC: (502) 782-2277.
490.notes_es: Oficina: 422 South Mulberry Street. Satélite Grayson County: (270) 259-4696.
490.services: Probation and parole supervision|Reporting and check-ins|Officer case management|Compliance monitoring|Lincoln Trail region supervision

491.description: LifeSkills Inc. Elizabethtown branch provides community mental health and substance use services for Hardin, LaRue, Meade, Breckinridge, and Grayson counties. Serves individuals leaving Hardin County Detention Center and surrounding facilities with outpatient therapy, psychiatric care, and crisis support. Part of LifeSkills 14-county south-central Kentucky CMHC network.
491.description_es: Sucursal LifeSkills Elizabethtown proporciona salud mental comunitaria y servicios de uso de sustancias para Hardin, LaRue, Meade, Breckinridge y Grayson. Atiende a personas que salen de Hardin County Detention Center.
491.notes: 24/7 Crisis: (270) 901-5151 (network-wide). Main Bowling Green hub: (270) 901-5000. Accepts Medicaid and most insurance.
491.hours: Crisis line 24/7; outpatient Mon–Fri business hours
491.services: Outpatient mental health therapy|Substance use counseling|Psychiatric services|24/7 crisis line|Jail reentry behavioral health linkage

492.description: Kentucky Career Center — Frankfort provides American Job Center services in Franklin County including free job search, resume help, career counseling, and WIOA training referrals. Serves individuals on probation or parole completing DOC employment requirements and Frankfort-area job seekers with barriers including criminal records.
492.description_es: Kentucky Career Center — Frankfort proporciona servicios de American Job Center en el Condado de Franklin incluyendo búsqueda de empleo gratuita, ayuda con currículum y referencias WIOA. Sirve a personas en libertad condicional que completan requisitos de empleo del DOC.
492.notes: Located at 921 Cherokee Road. Also access state job portal at focuscareer.ky.gov. Veterans priority services available.
492.notes_es: Ubicado en 921 Cherokee Road. Portal estatal: focuscareer.ky.gov. Servicios prioritarios para veteranos.
492.services: Job search and placement assistance|Resume and interview help|WIOA training referrals|Career counseling|Veterans employment services

493.description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 12 serves Franklin, Anderson, Owen, Carroll, Trimble, Henry, and Shelby counties from Frankfort. Supervises probation and parole in the capital region and north-central Kentucky. Office at 165 East Main Street, Frankfort.
493.description_es: Distrito 12 sirve a Franklin, Anderson, Owen, Carroll, Trimble, Henry y Shelby desde Frankfort. Supervisa libertad condicional y vigilada en la región de la capital.
493.notes: Carroll County satellite: (502) 732-6396. Oldham County: (502) 222-1492. Shelby County: (502) 633-3327.
493.services: Probation and parole supervision|Multi-county reporting|Officer case management|Compliance monitoring|Capital region supervision

494.description: Pennyroyal Center is the CMHC for Christian, Todd, Trigg, Caldwell, Crittenden, and Livingston counties in Western Kentucky's Pennyrile region. Provides outpatient mental health, psychiatric services, substance use treatment, and 24/7 crisis intervention. Offers in-jail mental health services at Christian County Jail and surrounding county detention centers.
494.description_es: Pennyroyal Center es el CMHC para Christian, Todd, Trigg, Caldwell, Crittenden y Livingston en la región Pennyrile. Proporciona salud mental ambulatoria, servicios psiquiátricos, tratamiento de sustancias e intervención en crisis 24/7. Servicios en la cárcel del Condado de Christian.
494.notes: Crisis line same as main: (270) 886-5163. Multiple outpatient offices across six-county region. Medicaid and sliding scale available.
494.notes_es: Línea de crisis igual que principal: (270) 886-5163. Múltiples oficinas ambulatorias en la región.
494.hours: Crisis line 24/7; outpatient Mon–Fri business hours
494.services: Outpatient mental health and SUD treatment|Psychiatric evaluation|24/7 crisis intervention|In-jail mental health services|Reentry behavioral health linkage

495.description: Audubon Area Community Services serves Henderson, Ohio, and Daviess counties with emergency financial assistance, LIHEAP, food resources, housing support, Head Start, and case management. Supports low-income individuals including those leaving Henderson County Detention Center. Henderson County office available separately from Owensboro headquarters.
495.description_es: Audubon Area Community Services sirve a Henderson, Ohio y Daviess con asistencia financiera de emergencia, LIHEAP, recursos alimentarios, vivienda y gestión de casos. Apoya a personas que salen de Henderson County Detention Center.
495.notes: Henderson County office: (270) 826-5531. LIHEAP seasonal enrollment—contact for current windows. Emergency aid requires documentation.
495.notes_es: Oficina Condado Henderson: (270) 826-5531. LIHEAP estacional—contacte para ventanas actuales.
495.services: LIHEAP utility assistance|Emergency financial aid|Food and housing support|Head Start|Case management

496.description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 2 serves Christian, Todd, Trigg, and surrounding Western Kentucky counties from Hopkinsville. Supervises probation and parole in the Pennyrile region. DOC listed phone: (270) 889-6530; office at 107 North Main Street.
496.description_es: Distrito 2 sirve a Christian, Todd, Trigg y condados circundantes del oeste de Kentucky desde Hopkinsville. Supervisa libertad condicional y vigilada en la región Pennyrile.
496.notes: Simpson County satellite: (270) 586-6881. Hopkins County: (270) 824-7518. Logan County: (270) 726-6530.
496.services: Probation and parole supervision|Pennyrile region reporting|Officer case management|Compliance monitoring|Multi-county supervision

497.description: LifeSkills Inc. Bowling Green is the headquarters CMHC serving 14 south-central Kentucky counties: Barren, Breckinridge, Butler, Edmonson, Grayson, Green, Hart, LaRue, Marion, Metcalfe, Monroe, Nelson, Taylor, and Washington. Provides mental health, substance use, and 24/7 crisis services with jail programming across the region. Main hub for the LifeSkills network.
497.description_es: LifeSkills Bowling Green es el CMHC central que sirve 14 condados del centro-sur de Kentucky. Proporciona salud mental, uso de sustancias y crisis 24/7 con programación en cárceles en toda la región. Hub principal de la red LifeSkills.
497.notes: 24/7 Crisis: (270) 901-5151. Elizabethtown branch (id 491) serves northern portion of region. Accepts Medicaid and most commercial insurance.
497.notes_es: Crisis 24/7: (270) 901-5151. Sucursal Elizabethtown (id 491) sirve la porción norte de la región.
497.hours: Crisis line 24/7; outpatient Mon–Fri business hours
497.services: Outpatient mental health and SUD treatment|Psychiatric services|24/7 crisis line|County jail programming|Regional CMHC hub

500.description: Kentucky Career Center — Paducah serves Western Kentucky's eight-county Purchase Area through the West Kentucky Workforce Development Board. Comprehensive American Job Center with free job search, resume workshops, WIOA training funding, career counseling, and second-chance employer connections for individuals with criminal records.
500.description_es: Kentucky Career Center — Paducah sirve el Área Purchase de ocho condados a través de West Kentucky WDB. Centro American Job Center con búsqueda de empleo gratuita, talleres, financiamiento WIOA y conexiones de segunda oportunidad.
500.notes: Partner with Four Rivers Behavioral Health for co-located services. Veterans and dislocated worker programs. Call for workshop schedule.
500.notes_es: Socio de Four Rivers Behavioral Health. Programas para veteranos y trabajadores desplazados.
500.services: Free job search and placement|Resume and skills workshops|WIOA training funding|Career counseling|Criminal record employment support

501.description: Kentucky Career Center — Green River in Owensboro serves Daviess, Hancock, Henderson, McLean, Ohio, Union, and Webster counties. Full-service American Job Center with job listings, skills assessment, resume help, WIOA training, and employer matching. Operated through Green River Workforce Development Board with county access points in rural communities.
501.description_es: Kentucky Career Center — Green River en Owensboro sirve siete condados del Río Verde. Centro American Job Center completo con listados de empleo, evaluación de habilidades, ayuda con currículum y capacitación WIOA.
501.notes: Text CAREER to 270-812-4866. On Owensboro Transit green route. County access points listed at kccgreenriver.com for rural residents.
501.notes_es: Envíe CAREER al 270-812-4866. Puntos de acceso del condado en kccgreenriver.com para residentes rurales.
501.services: Comprehensive job seeker services|WIOA training funding|Resume and interview assistance|Employer job matching|Rural county access points

502.description: Kentucky Career Center — Pikeville is operated by EKCEP (Eastern Kentucky Concentrated Employment Program), the same organization running the SITE recovery/reentry program (id 281). Provides free job search, resume help, WIOA training, career counseling, and recovery-informed employment services for justice-involved individuals in Pike and surrounding Eastern Kentucky counties.
502.description_es: Kentucky Career Center — Pikeville es operado por EKCEP, la misma organización del programa SITE (id 281). Proporciona búsqueda de empleo gratuita, ayuda con currículum, capacitación WIOA y servicios de empleo informados en recuperación.
502.notes: Recovery & Reentry: ekcep.org/recovery. Also EKCEP HQ in Hazard (412 Roy Campbell Drive). American Job Center network partner.
502.notes_es: Recovery & Reentry: ekcep.org/recovery. Sede EKCEP en Hazard (412 Roy Campbell Drive).
502.services: American Job Center services|Recovery-informed career advising|WIOA training funding|SITE reentry employment support|Resume and placement assistance

503.description: Kentucky Career Center — Somerset is the comprehensive one-stop center for the Lake Cumberland/Cumberlands workforce region, serving Pulaski and 12 surrounding counties. Free job search, resume assistance, employment workshops, veterans services, and WIOA training funding for individuals with criminal records and other barriers in south-central Kentucky.
503.description_es: Kentucky Career Center — Somerset es el centro integral para la región Lake Cumberland/Cumberlands, sirviendo a Pulaski y 12 condados circundantes. Búsqueda de empleo gratuita, talleres, servicios para veteranos y financiamiento WIOA.
503.notes: Operated through Kentucky Career Center Cumberlands. Walk-in welcome—bring photo ID. Serves 13-county Cumberlands region.
503.notes_es: Operado por Kentucky Career Center Cumberlands. Walk-in bienvenido—traiga identificación con foto.
503.services: Comprehensive job seeker services|Employment workshops|Veterans employment services|WIOA training funding|Business and employer services

504.description: Kentucky Career Center — Hopkinsville serves Christian County and nine Pennyrile region counties through the Pennyrile Workforce Area. Free career services including job readiness workshops, WIOA skills training funding, resume help, and connections to second-chance employers for individuals with criminal records.
504.description_es: Kentucky Career Center — Hopkinsville sirve al Condado de Christian y nueve condados de la región Pennyrile. Servicios profesionales gratuitos incluyendo talleres de preparación laboral, financiamiento WIOA y empleadores de segunda oportunidad.
504.notes: Pennyrile Allied Community Services (id 511) co-located for LIHEAP and emergency aid. Fort Campbell Blvd location near military community.
504.notes_es: Pennyrile Allied Community Services (id 511) co-ubicado para LIHEAP y ayuda de emergencia.
504.services: Job readiness workshops|WIOA training funding|Resume and placement assistance|Second-chance employer connections|Career counseling

505.description: Kentucky Career Center partner location in Corbin serves Laurel County and the Cumberland Valley region through Cumberlands Workforce. Free job search, resume assistance, career coaching, and WIOA training referrals for individuals with criminal records across Laurel, Knox, Bell, Whitley, Harlan, Clay, and surrounding counties.
505.description_es: Ubicación asociada de Kentucky Career Center en Corbin sirve al Condado de Laurel y la región Cumberland Valley. Búsqueda de empleo gratuita, ayuda con currículum y referencias WIOA para personas con antecedentes penales.
505.notes: Additional access points: 1909 South Snyder Ave (Corbin ATC), 103 Northside Plaza. Full comprehensive center in London at 100 University Drive. Call for hours at partner sites.
505.notes_es: Puntos adicionales: 1909 South Snyder Ave, 103 Northside Plaza. Centro completo en London en 100 University Drive.
505.hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m. (partner location; verify before visit)
505.services: Job search assistance|Resume workshops|WIOA training referrals|Career coaching|Criminal record employment support

506.description: Four Rivers Behavioral Health is the CMHC for nine western Kentucky Purchase Area counties: Ballard, Calloway, Carlisle, Fulton, Graves, Hickman, Livingston, Marshall, and McCracken. Provides integrated mental health, substance use, and intellectual/developmental disability services. Partners with McCracken County Regional Jail on overdose intervention and in-jail mental health screening. Turning Point recovery community center in Paducah.
506.description_es: Four Rivers Behavioral Health es el CMHC para nueve condados del Área Purchase: Ballard, Calloway, Carlisle, Fulton, Graves, Hickman, Livingston, Marshall y McCracken. Proporciona salud mental integrada, uso de sustancias y discapacidades del desarrollo. Socio de McCracken County Regional Jail.
506.notes: 24/7 Crisis: (800) 592-3980 (not the main office line). Turning Point recovery center downtown Paducah. County outpatient offices throughout Purchase region.
506.notes_es: Crisis 24/7: (800) 592-3980. Centro de recuperación Turning Point en Paducah.
506.hours: Crisis line 24/7; outpatient Mon–Fri business hours
506.services: Outpatient mental health and SUD treatment|Psychiatric services|24/7 crisis line|In-jail screening and overdose intervention|IDD services

507.description: River Valley Behavioral Health (RVBH) is the CMHC for Daviess County and six surrounding Green River region counties. Provides outpatient mental health therapy, psychiatric evaluation, medication management, substance use treatment, and 24/7 crisis services. Offers in-jail mental health linkage at Daviess County and Henderson County detention centers.
507.description_es: River Valley Behavioral Health es el CMHC para el Condado de Daviess y seis condados circundantes del Río Verde. Proporciona terapia ambulatoria, evaluación psiquiátrica, manejo de medicamentos, tratamiento de sustancias y crisis 24/7. Vinculación en cárceles de Daviess y Henderson.
507.notes: 24/7 Crisis: (270) 689-6500. Main Owensboro campus. Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, and most insurance. Co-located services with KCC Green River.
507.notes_es: Crisis 24/7: (270) 689-6500. Campus principal Owensboro. Acepta Medicaid y Medicare.
507.hours: Crisis line 24/7; outpatient Mon–Fri business hours
507.services: Outpatient mental health therapy|Psychiatric medication management|Substance use treatment|24/7 crisis services|In-jail mental health linkage

508.description: Adanta Group is the CMHC for eight south-central Kentucky counties: Adair, Casey, Clinton, Cumberland, McCreary, Pulaski, Russell, and Wayne. Provides behavioral health outpatient services, psychiatric care, substance use treatment, and crisis intervention with multiple county offices. Mental health linkage for individuals leaving Pulaski County Detention Center and surrounding jails.
508.description_es: Adanta Group es el CMHC para ocho condados del centro-sur de Kentucky: Adair, Casey, Clinton, Cumberland, McCreary, Pulaski, Russell y Wayne. Proporciona servicios ambulatorios, atención psiquiátrica, tratamiento de sustancias e intervención en crisis.
508.notes: 24/7 Crisis: (606) 679-1881. Call main line for nearest county office. Somerset headquarters serves Lake Cumberland region.
508.notes_es: Crisis 24/7: (606) 679-1881. Llame para la oficina del condado más cercana.
508.hours: Crisis line 24/7; county office hours vary
508.services: Outpatient behavioral health|Psychiatric care|Substance use treatment|Crisis intervention|Jail reentry mental health linkage

509.description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 13 serves Daviess, Hancock, Henderson, McLean, Muhlenberg, Ohio, Union, Webster, and Crittenden counties from Owensboro—not District 6 (which covers Boyle/Marion/Nelson). Office at 121 East Second Street, 4th Floor. Phone: (270) 687-7245 or 7246.
509.description_es: Distrito 13 del DOC sirve a Daviess, Hancock, Henderson, McLean, Muhlenberg, Ohio, Union, Webster y Crittenden desde Owensboro. Oficina en 121 East Second Street, piso 4. Teléfono: (270) 687-7245.
509.notes: Corrected from prior District 6 listing—Daviess County is District 13. Central DOC: (502) 782-2277.
509.notes_es: Corregido de listado previo del Distrito 6—Condado Daviess es Distrito 13. DOC central: (502) 782-2277.
509.services: Probation and parole supervision|Green River region reporting|Officer case management|Compliance monitoring|Multi-county western KY supervision

510.description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 15 serves Boyd, Carter, Elliott, Greenup, and surrounding Northeast Kentucky counties from Catlettsburg (Ashland area)—not District 8 (which covers Madison/Richmond). Main office: 3000 Louisa Street, Suite 1, Catlettsburg. Phone: (606) 739-5833. Satellite offices in Maysville and Sandy Hook.
510.description_es: Distrito 15 del DOC sirve a Boyd, Carter, Elliott, Greenup y condados del noreste de Kentucky desde Catlettsburg (área Ashland). Oficina: 3000 Louisa Street, Suite 1. Teléfono: (606) 739-5833.
510.notes: Covers Boyd, Bracken, Carter, Elliott, Fleming, Greenup, Lawrence, Lewis, Mason, Morgan. Maysville satellite: (606) 564-5591. Elliott Co.: (606) 738-4329.
510.notes_es: Incluye Boyd, Carter, Elliott, Greenup y más. Satélite Maysville: (606) 564-5591.
510.services: NE Kentucky probation supervision|Parole reporting|Multi-county supervision|Satellite office network|Compliance monitoring

511.description: Pennyrile Allied Community Services (PACS) is a community action agency serving nine western and south-central Kentucky counties. Provides LIHEAP utility assistance, emergency financial aid, food programs, housing support, weatherization, Head Start, and case management—including for individuals leaving county jails in Christian, Hopkins, Muhlenberg, and surrounding counties.
511.description_es: PACS es una agencia de acción comunitaria que sirve nueve condados del oeste y centro-sur de Kentucky. Proporciona LIHEAP, ayuda financiera de emergencia, alimentos, vivienda, climatización, Head Start y gestión de casos.
511.notes: LIHEAP enrollment seasonal. Co-located near Kentucky Career Center Hopkinsville (id 504). Income eligibility applies for most programs.
511.notes_es: Inscripción LIHEAP estacional. Co-ubicado cerca de Kentucky Career Center Hopkinsville (id 504).
511.services: LIHEAP utility assistance|Emergency financial aid|Food and housing programs|Weatherization|Head Start and case management

512.description: Purchase Area Development District (PADD) serves eight western Kentucky Purchase counties with LIHEAP energy assistance, housing programs, senior services, transportation coordination, and community planning. Connects individuals leaving McCracken County Regional Jail and surrounding detention centers with available local resources.
512.description_es: PADD sirve ocho condados del Área Purchase con asistencia energética LIHEAP, programas de vivienda, servicios para personas mayores y coordinación de transporte. Conecta a personas que salen de cárceles del condado con recursos locales.
512.notes: Headquartered Mayfield. LIHEAP administered locally—contact for enrollment. Also provides Ombudsman and aging services.
512.notes_es: Sede en Mayfield. LIHEAP administrado localmente—contacte para inscripción.
512.services: LIHEAP energy assistance|Housing program referrals|Senior and aging services|Transportation coordination|Community resource navigation

513.description: Green River Area Development District (GRADD) serves seven western Kentucky counties (Daviess, Hancock, Henderson, McLean, Ohio, Union, Webster) with LIHEAP, senior services, transportation, housing programs, and workforce development coordination. Resource hub for individuals leaving Daviess County Detention Center and surrounding jails.
513.description_es: GRADD sirve siete condados del oeste de Kentucky con LIHEAP, servicios para personas mayores, transporte, vivienda y coordinación de desarrollo laboral. Hub de recursos para personas que salen de la cárcel del Condado de Daviess.
513.notes: Hosts Kentucky Career Center Green River (id 501) workforce partnership. LIHEAP seasonal enrollment at gradd.com.
513.notes_es: Aloja la asociación laboral de Kentucky Career Center Green River (id 501).
513.services: LIHEAP utility assistance|Senior and disability services|Transportation coordination|Housing program info|Workforce development partnership

514.description: Buffalo Trace Area Development District (BTADD) serves six northeastern Kentucky counties: Bath, Bracken, Fleming, Mason, Nicholas, and Robertson. Provides LIHEAP utility assistance, housing programs, transportation, senior services, and emergency aid. Headquartered in Maysville—helps individuals leaving Mason County Detention Center navigate local resources.
514.description_es: BTADD sirve seis condados del noreste de Kentucky: Bath, Bracken, Fleming, Mason, Nicholas y Robertson. Proporciona LIHEAP, vivienda, transporte, servicios para personas mayores y ayuda de emergencia. Sede en Maysville.
514.notes: Partners with Maysville Community & Technical College adult education (id 524). LIHEAP contact through BTADD for Mason and surrounding counties.
514.notes_es: Socio de educación para adultos de MCTC Maysville (id 524). LIHEAP a través de BTADD.
514.services: LIHEAP energy assistance|Housing and emergency aid|Senior services|Transportation coordination|Community resource navigation

515.description: Barren River Area Development District (BRADD) serves eight south-central Kentucky counties: Barren, Butler, Edmonson, Hart, Logan, Metcalfe, Monroe, and Warren. Administers LIHEAP, senior and disability services, transportation coordination, housing programs, and workforce development—reaching rural communities beyond urban Bowling Green.
515.description_es: BRADD sirve ocho condados del centro-sur de Kentucky: Barren, Butler, Edmonson, Hart, Logan, Metcalfe, Monroe y Warren. Administra LIHEAP, servicios para personas mayores y con discapacidades, transporte, vivienda y desarrollo laboral.
515.notes: Rural county residents may use BRADD for LIHEAP when distant from Bowling Green services. Partners with SKYCTC and LifeSkills (id 497).
515.notes_es: Residentes rurales pueden usar BRADD para LIHEAP. Socio de SKYCTC y LifeSkills (id 497).
515.services: LIHEAP energy assistance|Senior and disability services|Transportation coordination|Housing programs|Workforce development partnership

516.description: Catholic Charities of the Diocese of Owensboro serves 33 counties across Western and South-Central Kentucky—one of the largest nonprofit footprints in the region. Provides emergency food, clothing, utility assistance, housing support, immigration services, and case management. Open to all regardless of faith, including returning citizens rebuilding stability.
516.description_es: Catholic Charities de la Diócesis de Owensboro sirve 33 condados en el oeste y centro-sur de Kentucky. Proporciona alimentos de emergencia, ropa, asistencia de servicios públicos, vivienda y gestión de casos. Abierto a todos independientemente de la fe.
516.notes: Multiple county outreach offices—call main line for nearest service point. Emergency assistance by appointment with documentation.
516.notes_es: Múltiples oficinas de alcance—llame para el punto de servicio más cercano. Asistencia de emergencia con cita.
516.hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; programs vary by location
516.services: Emergency food and clothing|Utility and rent assistance|Housing support|Case management|Immigration and family services

517.description: Ashland Community & Technical College (ACTC) Adult Education provides free GED preparation and adult literacy for Boyd County and surrounding Northeast Kentucky counties. Part of the KCTCS/KYAE statewide network with classes in community and county jail settings. Kentucky waives first-time GED test fees for eligible students passing GED Ready at a KYAE center.
517.description_es: Educación para Adultos de ACTC ofrece preparación GED gratuita y alfabetización para el Condado de Boyd y condados circundantes del noreste de Kentucky. Parte de la red KCTCS/KYAE con clases en cárceles del condado.
517.notes: Call (606) 326-2000 for enrollment. Promo code KYFREEGED1 for state-funded testing. Also offers ESL and workforce certifications.
517.notes_es: Llame al (606) 326-2000 para inscripción. Código promocional KYFREEGED1 para pruebas financiadas.
517.hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; class schedules vary
517.services: Free GED preparation|Adult literacy|Corrections education in jails|GED Ready testing|ESL and workforce certifications

518.description: Big Sandy Community & Technical College (BSCTC) Adult Education offers free GED classes for Floyd, Johnson, Lawrence, Magoffin, Martin, and Pike counties. Part of KCTCS/KYAE with instruction inside Big Sandy Regional Detention Center and Pike County Detention Center—critical for Eastern Kentucky reentry education.
518.description_es: Educación para Adultos de BSCTC ofrece clases GED gratuitas para Floyd, Johnson, Lawrence, Magoffin, Martin y Pike. Parte de KCTCS/KYAE con instrucción dentro de Big Sandy Regional Detention Center y Pike County Detention Center.
518.notes: Prestonsburg campus: One Bert T. Combs Drive. Call (606) 886-3863 for enrollment. First-time GED testing fees waived through KYAE.
518.notes_es: Campus Prestonsburg: One Bert T. Combs Drive. Llame al (606) 886-3863. Tarifas GED exoneradas para primeros solicitantes.
518.services: Free GED preparation|Jail-based GED instruction|GED Ready testing|Adult literacy|Workforce certification pathways

519.description: Somerset Community College (SCC) Adult Education provides free GED preparation and adult education for Pulaski County and the Lake Cumberland region. KCTCS/KYAE network member serving adults in community settings and county jails. State-funded first-time GED testing for eligible students.
519.description_es: Educación para Adultos de SCC proporciona preparación GED gratuita para el Condado de Pulaski y la región Lake Cumberland. Miembro de la red KCTCS/KYAE con clases en comunidades y cárceles del condado.
519.notes: Call (606) 679-8501 for enrollment and class locations. Partner location also at 1520 N Main St Suite 4 for workforce programs.
519.notes_es: Llame al (606) 679-8501 para inscripción. Ubicación asociada en 1520 N Main St Suite 4.
519.services: Free GED preparation|County jail adult education|GED Ready testing|Adult literacy|Workforce skills training

520.description: Owensboro Community & Technical College (OCTC) Adult Education offers free GED preparation and adult literacy for Daviess County and surrounding Green River counties. KCTCS/KYAE provider with classes at community locations and Daviess County Detention Center. First-time GED test fees waived for KYAE-eligible students.
520.description_es: Educación para Adultos de OCTC ofrece preparación GED gratuita y alfabetización para el Condado de Daviess y condados circundantes del Río Verde. Proveedor KCTCS/KYAE con clases en Daviess County Detention Center.
520.notes: Call (270) 686-4400 for enrollment. GED Ready free at KYAE center. Also offers ESL and workplace certifications.
520.notes_es: Llame al (270) 686-4400 para inscripción. GED Ready gratis en centro KYAE.
520.services: Free GED preparation|Jail-based adult education|GED Ready testing|ESL programs|Workplace certification training
